scripts.build: pnpm --filter @local-assistant/shared build && pnpm --filter @local-assistant/backend build && pnpm --filter @local-assistant/desktop build
scripts.build:backend-binary: pnpm --filter @local-assistant/shared build && pnpm --filter @local-assistant/backend build && node packages/backend/scripts/build-binary.mjs
scripts.build:backend-binary:all: pnpm --filter @local-assistant/shared build && pnpm --filter @local-assistant/backend build && node packages/backend/scripts/build-binary.mjs --all
scripts.build:dist: pnpm build:backend-binary && pnpm download:ollama && pnpm --filter @local-assistant/desktop tauri build
